title: Maxillaria purpurea
taxonomy: Maxillaria purpurea is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family comprises of approximately 30,000 species of orchids, which are one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. Maxillaria purpurea is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, a large and complex subfamily within the Orchidaceae family. The genus Maxillaria is a large and diverse group of orchids, with over 500 species spread across the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. Maxillaria purpurea's classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native habitats.
uses: Maxillaria purpurea is a species of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential health benefits.
